title: CobbleGalaxy - Cobblemon
description: Cobblemon Modpack - Add Pokemon to your Minecraft world! Increases FPS and performance! Multiplayer server with Gyms, Tournaments, Mega Evolutions, & more!
body:
Cobblemon Modpack - Add Pokemon to your Minecraft world! Increases FPS and performance! Multiplayer server with Gyms, Tournaments, Mega Evolutions, & more!


Server Features:

- Legendary Pokemon 
- Mega Evolution 
- Z-Crystals 
- Breeding System
- Bosses 
- PokeHunts 
- PokeBuilder 
- Dex Rewards 
- WonderTrade 
- Player Gyms 
- and so much more
